label: FACIS DSP — Health & Metrics
info:
GET /api/v1/dsp/health — returns {status, service, transfers_count}.
GET /dsp/metrics             — Prometheus text format with 4 counter families:
  facis_dsp_catalogue_requests_total
  facis_dsp_transfer_requests_total{format}
  facis_dsp_transfer_completions_total
  facis_dsp_transfer_errors_total

Paths are namespaced by service to avoid colliding with the Simulation flow's
/api/v1/health and /metrics on the shared ORCE pod (BREAKING CHANGE vs the
Python service which served /api/v1/health and /metrics).

name: build health body
build prometheus text
increment counter
